summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Lluvia Live new features: Gift system and Bot floating. All backend APIs (13/13 tests passed - 100%) and frontend UI flows working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/gifts returns all 8 gift types with correct structure
Backend: Gift prices match expected values (rosa:100, corazon:500, diamante:5000, corona:10000, dragon:50000, castillo:100000, lluvia_oro:500000, mega_crown:1000000)
Backend: POST /api/gifts/send with invalid gift type returns 400
Backend: POST /api/gifts/send with invalid sender returns 404
Backend: POST /api/gifts/send with invalid receiver returns 404
Backend: POST /api/bot/command works for dueño role
Backend: POST /api/bot/command returns 403 for non-dueño
Backend: GET /api/bot/history works for dueño role
Backend: GET /api/bot/history returns 403 for non-dueño
Backend: Melvin_Live has dueño role
Backend: New users get 'usuario' role (not dueño)
Backend: POST /api/gifts/send successfully sends rosa gift and updates balance
Backend: Gift message appears in room chat after sending
Frontend: Login with Melvin_Live / test123 successful
Frontend: Bot floating button (🤖) visible on Dashboard for dueño
Frontend: Bot floating button visible in Room view for dueño
Frontend: Clicking bot button opens chat panel with 'Bot Lluvia Live' header
Frontend: Bot panel shows 'Privado - Solo tu' indicator
Frontend: Bot panel has input field (data-testid='bot-input')
Frontend: Bot panel has send button (data-testid='bot-send-btn')
Frontend: Bot panel has close button (data-testid='bot-close-btn')
Frontend: Bot panel has quick action buttons
Frontend: Bot responds to questions (e.g., 'Hay 40 usuarios en total.')
Frontend: Bot panel closes when close button clicked
Frontend: Gift icon (🎁) appears on OTHER users' seats (not your own)
Frontend: Clicking other user's seat opens gift panel overlay
Frontend: Gift panel shows 'Enviar regalo a {username}' header
Frontend: Gift panel shows all 8 gifts with names and prices
Frontend: Gift panel shows 'Tus monedas' balance
Frontend: Gift panel has close button (data-testid='close-gifts-btn')
Frontend: Sending gift works and appears in room chat
Frontend: Gift panel closes after sending gift
Frontend: Bot floating button NOT visible for regular users (role='usuario')
Frontend: Bot floating button NOT visible in room for regular users
Frontend: 'por la sala' button opens personal room correctly
Frontend: Dashboard original design preserved (Weekly Family Star, lista/Pareja/Clan cards)
test_credentials: Username: Melvin_Live, Password: test123, User ID: b45958bc-2c6b-49ea-8102-a11197001e53, Role: dueño
seed_data_creation: Created test_regular_user_bot for testing bot visibility. Test user 4bea36c7-5c7f-48b0-ae68-97af4ac8890b was temporarily added to room for gift testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features working correctly: 1) Gift system: GET /api/gifts returns 8 gifts (rosa, corazon, diamante, corona, dragon, castillo, lluvia_oro, mega_crown). POST /api/gifts/send works with sender_id, receiver_id, gift_type, room_id. Gift icon (🎁) shows on other users' seats in RoomView. Clicking opens gift panel overlay. 2) Bot floating: BotFloating component in App.js shows 🤖 button only for role='dueño'. Opens chat panel with POST /api/bot/command. Bot responds to questions. Panel has quick action buttons. 3) Previous features still working: 'por la sala' opens personal room, dashboard design preserved.

gift_system.api_get_gifts: Returns all 8 gift types with name, emoji, cost, value
gift_system.api_send_gift: Deducts from sender, adds to receiver, logs in room chat
gift_system.ui_gift_panel: Opens on seat click, shows 8 gifts with prices, shows balance
gift_system.ui_gift_send: Sends gift, closes panel, shows in chat

bot_floating.visibility_dueno: Visible on Dashboard and Room for dueño role
bot_floating.panel_quick_actions: Quick action buttons for common questions
bot_floating.bot_response: Bot responds to questions via POST /api/bot/command

features_verified.original_design: Dashboard preserved with Weekly Family Star, lista/Pareja/Clan cards
